calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Continued To Apr-06-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Hearing On Jane Doe'S Motion To Quash Subpoena To Time Warner Cable
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY, JEFFREY M. ROSENFELD OF KRONENBERGER/ROSENFELD, TEL. NO. 955-1155 X 112 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF DON TURNER'S Notice Of Hearing On Jane Doe'S Motion To Quash Subpoena To Time Warner Cable - 'Motion to quash' IS denied. Plaintiff has demonstrated his entitlement to seek the information sought by the subpoena and Jane's Doe's objections to the subpoena lacks merit. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =(302/HEK)
